'''sothasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:byzantine|byzantine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:byzantine|byzantine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sothasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sothasithi|sothasithi]] || [[word:sothasiji|sothasiji]] || [[word:sothasishi|sothasishi]] || [[word:sothasiki|sothasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sothasuthuthu|sothasuthuthu]] || [[word:sothasujuju|sothasujuju]] || [[word:sothasushushu|sothasushushu]] || [[word:sothasukuku|sothasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sothasuthu|sothasuthu]] || [[word:sothasuju|sothasuju]] || [[word:sothasushu|sothasushu]] || [[word:sothasuku|sothasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sothasufthuf|sothasufthuf]] || [[word:sothasufjuf|sothasufjuf]] || [[word:sothasufshuf|sothasufshuf]] || [[word:sothasufkuf|sothasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sothasethe|sothasethe]] || [[word:sothaseje|sothaseje]] || [[word:sothaseshe|sothaseshe]] || [[word:sothaseke|sothaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sothasothotho|sothasothotho]] || [[word:sothasojojo|sothasojojo]] || [[word:sothasoshosho|sothasoshosho]] || [[word:sothasokoko|sothasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sothasotho|sothasotho]] || [[word:sothasojo|sothasojo]] || [[word:sothasosho|sothasosho]] || [[word:sothasoko|sothasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sothasofthof|sothasofthof]] || [[word:sothasofjof|sothasofjof]] || [[word:sothasofshof|sothasofshof]] || [[word:sothasofkof|sothasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sothasïfthïf|sothasïfthïf]] || [[word:sothasïfjïf|sothasïfjïf]] || [[word:sothasïfshïf|sothasïfshïf]] || [[word:sothasïfkïf|sothasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sothasïfthïfthïf|sothasïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:sothasïfjïfjïf|sothasïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:sothasïfshïfshïf|sothasïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:sothasïfkïfkïf|sothasïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sothasïfthïf|sothasïfthïf]] || [[word:sothasïfjïf|sothasïfjïf]] || [[word:sothasïfshïf|sothasïfshïf]] || [[word:sothasïfkïf|sothasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sothasïfthïf|sothasïfthïf]] || [[word:sothasïfjïf|sothasïfjïf]] || [[word:sothasïfshïf|sothasïfshïf]] || [[word:sothasïfkïf|sothasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sothasæthæ|sothasæthæ]] || [[word:sothasæjæ|sothasæjæ]] || [[word:sothasæshæ|sothasæshæ]] || [[word:sothasækæ|sothasækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sothasathatha|sothasathatha]] || [[word:sothasajaja|sothasajaja]] || [[word:sothasashasha|sothasashasha]] || [[word:sothasakaka|sothasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sothasatha|sothasatha]] || [[word:sothasaja|sothasaja]] || [[word:sothasasha|sothasasha]] || [[word:sothasaka|sothasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sothasafthaf|sothasafthaf]] || [[word:sothasafjaf|sothasafjaf]] || [[word:sothasafshaf|sothasafshaf]] || [[word:sothasafkaf|sothasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sothasasha|sothasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sothashësha|sothashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sothasrosha|sothasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sothasmusha|sothasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sothasyasha|sothasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosothasnkshësha|gosothasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosothasnkrosha|gosothasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosothasnkmusha|gosothasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosothasnkyasha|gosothasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sothathasasha|sothathasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sothathashësha|sothathashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sothathasrosha|sothathasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sothathasmusha|sothathasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sothathasyasha|sothathasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosothathasnkshësha|gosothathasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosothathasnkrosha|gosothathasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosothathasnkmusha|gosothathasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosothathasnkyasha|gosothathasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sethæsasha|sethæsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sethæshësha|sethæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sethæsrosha|sethæsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sethæsmusha|sethæsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sethæsyasha|sethæsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosethæsnkshësha|gosethæsnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosethæsnkrosha|gosethæsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosethæsnkmusha|gosethæsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosethæsnkyasha|gosethæsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sothfasasha|sothfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sothfashësha|sothfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sothfasrosha|sothfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sothfasmusha|sothfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sothfasyasha|sothfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosothfasnkshësha|gosothfasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosothfasnkrosha|gosothfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosothfasnkmusha|gosothfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosothfasnkyasha|gosothfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
